data.description: Nestled in Buduran, Taketama Coffee is a delightful fusion of Japanese aesthetics and culinary offerings. With its charming decor featuring traditional elements like Torii gates and classic Japanese houses, this café creates an inviting atmosphere perfect for relaxation or productivity. Since opening in December 2020, it has quickly become a popular spot in Sidoarjo, celebrated on social media for its picturesque indoor and outdoor settings.

  position: relative;
}
.nuka-overflow {

  scrollbar-width: none;
}
.nuka-overflow.scroll-smooth {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}
.nuka-overflow.scroll-auto {

}
.nuka-overflow::-webkit-scrollbar {

}

metadata.description: Nestled in Buduran, Taketama Coffee is a delightful fusion of Japanese aesthetics and culinary offerings. With its charming decor featuring traditional elements like Torii gates and classic Japanese houses, this café creates an inviting atmosphere perfect for relaxation or productivity. Since opening in December 2020, it has quickly become a popular spot in Sidoarjo, celebrated on social media for its picturesque indoor and outdoor settings.
